name: minder_platform_tools
description: Minder Platform AI Tools - Enable LLM to call Minder APIs

function.name: get_crypto_price
function.description: Get current cryptocurrency price and market data from Minder Platform database. Returns price, market cap, and 24h change.

symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL, ADA, DOT)

function.name: collect_crypto_data
function.description: Trigger cryptocurrency data collection from Binance, CoinGecko, and Kraken. Collects latest prices, market caps, and trading data.

function.name: get_latest_news
function.description: Get latest news articles from Minder Platform database with sentiment analysis. Returns headlines, sources, and sentiment scores.

limit.description: Maximum number of articles to return (default: 10)

source.description: Filter by news source (BBC, Guardian, NPR)

function.name: collect_news
function.description: Trigger news collection from RSS feeds (BBC, Guardian, NPR). Collects latest articles with sentiment analysis.

function.name: get_plugin_status
function.description: Get health status and information for all Minder Platform plugins. Returns list with health status, enabled state, and last health check time.

function.name: get_network_metrics
function.description: Get latest network performance metrics including latency, throughput, packet loss, and connection statistics from Minder Platform.

limit.description: Number of recent metrics to return (default: 10)

function.name: get_weather_data
function.description: Get latest weather data including temperature, humidity, conditions, and forecasts for configured locations from Minder Platform.

location.description: Location to get weather for (default: Istanbul)

function.name: get_tefas_funds
function.description: Get Turkish investment fund data from TEFAS. Returns fund prices, daily returns, and performance metrics from 45,000+ funds.

function.name: enable_plugin
function.description: Enable a Minder Platform plugin (crypto, news, network, weather, tefas). Requires admin privileges. Returns success message.
